urlencoded.description: (Required) Name of product
(Required) The description of the product
(Required) Price should be in kobo if currency is NGN, pesewas, if currency is GHS, and cents, if currency is ZAR
(Required) Currency in which price is set. Allowed values are: NGN, GHS, ZAR or USD
Set to true if the product has limited stock. Leave as false if the product has unlimited stock
Number of products in stock. Use if limited is true

urlencoded.description: (Required) Name of page
The description of the page
Amount should be in kobo if currency is NGN, pesewas, if currency is GHS, and cents, if currency is ZAR
URL slug you would like to be associated with this page. Page will be accessible at https://paystack.com/pay/[slug]
Stringified JSON object of custom data
If you would like Paystack to redirect to a URL upon successful payment, specify the URL here.
If you would like to accept custom fields, specify them here.
If you would like to accept custom fields, specify them here.

info.name: Paystack Products and Payment Pages API

description.content:
Create and manage products in your inventory and Paystack-hosted Payment Pages so you can collect payments without writing custom checkout code.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com
